text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We have a day off, so I'm chaperoning Fine Motion on a day trip out
to the mountains.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale... Ah, the air is so fresh out here in the forest! It reminds me of mornings in the garden back home.

text_block_list.name: Captain's Voice over Phone
text_block_list.text:
...That will be all, Trainer. Please remain vigilant, and ensure Her
Highness's safety.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, thank you again for your time, Trainer. They certainly
wouldn't have let me come this far out alone.
choice_data_list: Just happy to—uh, what are we here to do, anyways?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's an excellent question. Hehehe, you see...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...I haven't planned anything! I just thought we'd have ourselves a
nice, normal stroll in the great outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes, although, um... You never know what surprises could be waiting
out there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I smell mischief brewing, but I let it slide for now, and we set off on
the path.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Ah, that was delicious! Not to toot my own horn, but the cold
noodles I packed came out perfectly.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And made it so far, too. No more city—just the creek gurgling, birds
singing, bugs chirping... It feels like we wandered into a fairytale
world.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know, it reminds me of a story I read when I was little. The hero
saves the princess, and they're running through the woods together...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And then, the dragon catches up to steal the princess back. It actually
attacks them in a remote clearing just like this.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. It feels like the dragon could pop out any second, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just a "what-if," silly. But if a dragon really did jump out... You
would fight to protect me... Right?
choice_data_list: That's a big "if," but sure. I would protect you.
That's a big "if," but sure. I would protect you.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Really?! I'm flattered! Aw, now I almost wish a dragon would appear.
GrooooOOOOOOAR!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ah! Trainer, look! There's something in the river!

text_block_list.name: Dragon
text_block_list.text: Graaaaawr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From the water emerges... a tyrannosaurus rex costume with big
flabby wings for arms.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: A dragon! Oh no! Don't come any closer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While my mind struggles for a comeback, the... dragon(?) crosses its
arms, striking a pose straight out of a monster movie.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Whatever am I to do? The evil dragon is going to eat me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, if only—if only a hero would slay the dragon and rescue me from
my plight...
choice_data_list: ...All right, all RIGHT! Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Dragon
text_block_list.text: Rooooar!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My hero! May courage guide your hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wrestle the dragon for minutes, getting pushed back and forth
aimlessly until finally...

text_block_list.name: Dragon
text_block_list.text: Groooar! I have fallen!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness! You were so dashing, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we've got no time to celebrate. The dragon gets back on its feet
and then... removes its head.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. Congratulations.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Three, two, one!

text_block_list.name: Fine & Captain
text_block_list.text: Surpriiiise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I am shocked and flabbergasted by this entirely unexpected turn of
events.
choice_data_list: ...Why are you trying to surprise me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe... Remember the other day, when we helped take that kitty
home?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I kept thinking to myself what a nice surprise it was, so I decided to
plan another, just for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...How was it? Did you like it?
choice_data_list:
It definitely caught me off guard, but... yeah, I
did enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad! All that rehearsal was worth it, I see. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm also happy you kept your promise—that you'd protect me from the
dragon.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The un-dragon-ified Captain joins us for the rest of the hike. We
enjoy the view from the mountain's peak, then leisurely make our way
home.

text_block_list.name: Owner of Ramen Rampage
text_block_list.text: Oh, welcome back, lassie. Can I getcha the usual?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, for three, please.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Whew... After all that, it feels nice to be back. Thank you both for
such an exciting outing.
choice_data_list:
The wrestling match wore me out more than I
thought.

The wrestling match wore me out more than I
thought.

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Heh. I've got quite a lot of practice being the dragon. Her Highness
even made me a medal for it when she was little.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I remember that! The medal for draconic excellence, right? I
made it with flowers, twigs, and clovers.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now that you mention it, I wonder what award I should give our
dashing hero. How about... "the dragon slayer's medallion"?
choice_data_list: I-it'd be an honor. I think?
I-it'd be an honor. I think?

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Dragon Slayer. Just so you know, though, I'm also a
decorated actor of witches and fortresses. You've not bested me yet.

text_block_list.name: Owner of Ramen Rampage
text_block_list.text: Order up. Three bowls of savory shio ramen, with extra toppings.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Eh?! The savory shio ramen doesn't come with menma or corn, and I
didn't say anything. How did you know?

text_block_list.name: Owner of Ramen Rampage
text_block_list.text:
I remember my regulars' usual orders—toppings and all. The extras are
on the house, so you three enjoy 'em.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: We absolutely will. Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The "usual," though... I suppose there's a lot of charm in the ordinary
everyday routine, too.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's odd to think that I'm a "regular" here now. Eating ramen and
chatting with everyone has become such a normal part of my life.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: You know, I think maybe, just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: No, it's nothing. I was just struck by what a lovely day it's been.
